prompt: A dark terminal-aesthetic illustration of a skills/plugin marketplace. Package cards arranged in a 3x3 grid on a deep black background (#0a0e14), each card showing a monospace label like @org/commit-skill, @org/deploy-skill, @org/review-skill with glowing green borders. Green phosphor glow effects. Bottom shows a terminal command: $ claude mcp add marketplace. Futuristic hacker aesthetic, no people, pure UI visualization.
